description: v0.4.4 — minimal core capabilities + two custom vault commands (config_get, vault_list_all). The webview can manage its own window. No shell, no fs, no http — vault operations are gated through explicit Tauri commands. Future commands (vault_read, vault_write, vault_delete, config_set, search, links/import) will be added in v0.4.4.x follow-ups.
